description_long: This obelisk is a weathered stone monument set atop a broad, square platform with a slightly raised central plinth. The central shaft of the obelisk is adorned with a sculpted human head and stylized wings or bones extending from either side, giving it a dramatic and somber appearance. The stone surface is mottled with shades of gray and white, suggesting age and exposure to the elements. The base is composed of two stepped layers, providing stability and a sense of prominence. There are no visible inscriptions or text, but the sculptural details serve as the primary decorative elements. The overall design evokes a sense of solemnity, making it suitable for placement in parks, plazas, or memorial sites.
description: A weathered stone obelisk with a sculpted human head and wing-like extensions, set on a stepped square platform. The surface is mottled gray and white, with no visible inscriptions.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sculpted human head and wing-like extensions prominently on the central shaft, with the stepped base clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the symmetrical wing-like extensions and the head, with the square platform and plinth visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the back of the sculpted head and wings visible, and the stepped base in full view.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other profile of the head and wings, with the platform and plinth structure evident.
attribute_ornamentation: The obelisk features a sculpted human head and stylized wing or bone-like extensions on the central shaft, serving as the primary decorative elements.
attribute_base_design: The base consists of a broad, square platform with a slightly raised central plinth, both made of the same mottled stone. The design is simple and robust, with two stepped layers providing elevation and prominence.
attribute_tip_design: The tip of the obelisk is flat and unadorned, blending seamlessly with the shaft and lacking any pointed or decorative features.
